conventions.rotation: ccw_slot increases counterclockwise; slot 0 is the tag
conventions.hourglass: two separate half-edges with strand values 0 and 1
conventions.topology_rule: tagged_ccw_rotation is authoritative; curve crossings never redefine it
conventions.replacement_rule: C1 and C2 are tangent to the removed incident edges at P0 and P3
conventions.untwist_rule: transpose the recorded half-edge slots and multiply the coefficient by -1 per transposition

pre_untwist_state.name: X crossing tangent replacement before untwist
X parallel tangent replacement before untwist
